---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that webfetch doesn't do well today?

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal behavior look like? A CLI flag, a new endpoint, a config option?

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or adjacent tools that solve this differently.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art, etc.
